info.title: Shuchu API
info.description: API for the Shuchu task management application with OpenAPI documentation

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the tag was last updated

description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the API endpoints

startAt.description: Start date for the task in ISO 8601 format

endAt.description: End date for the task in ISO 8601 format

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the task was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the task was last updated

error.description: Error message describing what went wrong

description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the API endpoints

dueDate.description: Due date for the task in ISO 8601 format

startAt.description: Start date for the task in ISO 8601 format

endAt.description: End date for the task in ISO 8601 format

completedAt.description: Completion timestamp. Use null to mark the task as incomplete

description.example: Write comprehensive documentation for the API endpoints

dueDate.description: Due date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove due date

startAt.description: Start date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove start date

endAt.description: End date for the task in ISO 8601 format. Use null to remove end date

completedAt.description: Completion timestamp. Use null to mark the task as incomplete

tagIds.description: Array of tag IDs to associate with the task. Replaces all existing tags

taskId.description: Task ID associated with this comment

body.example: Wrapped up pomodoro #1, still need to draft summary.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the comment was last updated

body.example: Summarized what happened during today’s session.

startTime.description: Timestamp when the timer was started

endTime.description: Timestamp when the timer was ended (null for active timers)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the timer was created

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the timer was last updated

activities.description: Timeline entries combining timers and comments in descending timestamp order

taskId.description: ID of the task to start timer for

startTime.description: Timestamp when the timer should start

endTime.description: Timestamp when the timer ended. Use null to remove end time

get.description: Check if the API is running

schema.description: Filter tasks by whether they have an active timer running

parameters.description: Filter tasks by whether they have an active timer running
parameters.name: hasActiveTimer

schema.description: Filter tasks by whether they have a scheduled start time (startAt). true = only scheduled tasks, false = only unscheduled tasks

parameters.description: Filter tasks by whether they have a scheduled start time (startAt). true = only scheduled tasks, false = only unscheduled tasks
parameters.name: scheduled

schema.description: Sort tasks by field (createdAt, startAt, or dueDate)

parameters.description: Sort tasks by field (createdAt, startAt, or dueDate)
parameters.name: sortBy

schema.description: Sort order: asc (ascending/oldest first) or desc (descending/newest first). Defaults to desc

parameters.description: Sort order: asc (ascending/oldest first) or desc (descending/newest first). Defaults to desc
parameters.name: order

schema.description: Filter tasks by tag IDs (comma-separated). Returns tasks with ANY of the specified tags (OR logic)

parameters.description: Filter tasks by tag IDs (comma-separated). Returns tasks with ANY of the specified tags (OR logic)
parameters.name: tags

get.description: Retrieve a specific task by ID

put.description: Update an existing task by ID

post.summary: Create a comment for a task

get.description: Retrieve all timers across all tasks

schema.description: IDs of the tasks to get timers for

parameters.description: IDs of the tasks to get timers for
parameters.name: taskIds

post.description: Start a new timer for a task

get.description: Retrieve all timers for a specific task
Retrieve a specific timer by its ID

put.description: Update an existing timer (typically to set end time)

get.description: Retrieve all tags for the current user

400.description: Bad request - duplicate tag name or invalid input

get.description: Retrieve a specific tag by ID

put.description: Update an existing tag by ID

400.description: Bad request - duplicate tag name or invalid input

delete.description: Delete a tag by ID. This will also remove the tag from all associated tasks.
